channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog mess constantly, 6th July
item.description:
We have big problem constantly clearing dog poo outside the street ranging from number 8 to number 14 Crebor street London SE22 0HF

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Crebor Street, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter Bin, 6th July
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 04/07/26 Litter Bins – Overflowing Lat/Long - 51.4238211, -0.0308787 what3words - dome.hands.rails Nearest address - 58 Montana Gardens, Lower Sydenham, London, SE26 5BG Worsley Bridge Road by Bridge over pool river. Please empty litter bin Reference - 5695896 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Open 04/07/2026 18:35 Worsley Bridge Road by Bridge over pool river. Please empty litter bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drainin road is overflowing and heavy rains are causing the area shown to collect water and seep down to basement rooms, causing damp and mould., 6th July
item.description:
This needs to be addressed ASAP as basement walls are getting worse. Every time it rains it seeps down the pavement into the basement rooms below. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pascal Mews, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van, 6th July
item.description:
Abandoned van around the back of 16 Lubbock court, BR7 5JW where the garages are Around the back , the van is untaxed and no MOT and has been there for the last year

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lubbock Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clicking, 6th July
item.description:
Loud clicking day and night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Russell Close, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large bottle of antifreeze dumped, 6th July
item.description:
Black container of antifreeze left on the street at top of Hardings Lane where it meets Parish Lane Se20

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hardings Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste bag ripped open in street, 6th July
item.description:
Bag of rubbish has been left out then presumably opened by foxes, spread across the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Penge Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 6th July
item.description:
Drain is blocked with mud and debris outside number 15-17 Crumpsall St.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crumpsall Street, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped again, 6th July
item.description:
More Rubbish dumped on grass area looks very unsightly and is a regular occurrence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayplace Avenue, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: MDF panels and child's scooter dumped, 6th July
item.description:
Flytipping on pavement in front of the old police station building again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 173, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On 63 pratt street, 6th July
item.description:
We were not notified there wpuld be road works taking place, this is our only access road to the loading bay so we need to know the scope of works and how long they will be going on for.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pratt Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite Boxgrove Road Primary School: large piece of black plastic., 6th July
item.description:
Fly-tip is on the edge of the grass verge opposite the school and is partially obscured by the long grass.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Boxgrove Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suitcase flipped, 6th July
item.description:
Near telecoms cabinet and street art on gates, Wordsworth Rd SE20

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wordsworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big flytip of rubbish near public bin, 6th July
item.description:
At least seven black bags full of household waste plus other items dumped. This has become a real flytipping trouble spot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bycroft Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of disused council workers’ yard Felixstowe Road: bath, etc., 6th July
item.description:
Fly-tip has been there for over four days.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Felixstowe Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing and bags dumped next to it, 6th July
item.description:
As usual, this bin on Green Lane is overflowing on a Monday morning. Two black bags and one green one next to it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Side of 18 Mottisfont Road: office furniture (?), 6th July
item.description:
Fly-tip is on grass verge at side of 18 Mottisfont Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottisfont Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 6th July
item.description:
Fridge & bag dumped on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): White Hart Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glengall Passage, 6th July
item.description:
This little passage needs to be properly cleaned, the stench of human urine coming from it is disgusting. It is clear it used by male humans to piss and defecate and this is something that should be clearly stopped
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead baby fox, 6th July
item.description:
Dog walker

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Draven Close, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
